tasks.subject: Task 1: Add withLoggedUse pure helper to olab.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure, unit-tested function that takes a combo's existing history array and today's date string, and returns the history with today's use logged (deduped, most-recent-first).

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/utils/olab.ts` (add function after `history()`, currently at `app/utils/olab.ts:79-81`)
- Test: `app/utils/olab.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `withLoggedUse([], '2026-07-08')` returns `['2026-07-08']`
- [ ] `withLoggedUse(['2026-07-01'], '2026-07-08')` returns `['2026-07-08', '2026-07-01']`
- [ ] `withLoggedUse(['2026-07-01', '2026-07-08'], '2026-07-08')` returns `['2026-07-08', '2026-07-01']` (no duplicate)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run app/utils/olab.test.ts` → all tests pass, including the 3 new ones.

Full plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-combo-card-note-loguse.md` (Task 1)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/utils/olab.ts", "app/utils/olab.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run app/utils/olab.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["withLoggedUse([], '2026-07-08') returns ['2026-07-08']", "withLoggedUse(['2026-07-01'], '2026-07-08') returns ['2026-07-08', '2026-07-01']", "withLoggedUse(['2026-07-01', '2026-07-08'], '2026-07-08') returns ['2026-07-08', '2026-07-01'] with no duplicate"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add logUse action to combos store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A Pinia store action that logs a use for "today" on a given combo and persists it immediately, mirroring the existing `toggleFavorite`/`setRating` actions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/stores/combos.ts:1-2` (imports), `:54-67` (add action + update return statement)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `logUse(id)` finds the combo, computes updated history via `withLoggedUse`, calls `save(...)` with the rest of the combo's fields unchanged.
- [ ] `logUse(id)` is a no-op if no combo with that id exists in `combos.value`.
- [ ] `logUse` is exported from the store's returned object.
- [ ] `npx nuxt typecheck` passes with no new errors.

**Verify:** `npx nuxt typecheck` → no errors in `app/stores/combos.ts`.

Full plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-combo-card-note-loguse.md` (Task 2)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/stores/combos.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx nuxt typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["logUse(id) computes updated history via withLoggedUse and calls save with other fields unchanged", "logUse(id) is a no-op if id not found", "logUse exported from store"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create NotePopover.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A small, reusable, Teleport-based popover component that shows a note's text anchored near a trigger element's screen position, and closes on outside click.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/components/cards/NotePopover.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Renders via `<Teleport to="body">` (required because `ComboCard.vue`'s root element uses `overflow: hidden`, which would otherwise clip the popover).
- [ ] Displays the `note` prop's text inside a rounded bubble.
- [ ] Positions the bubble using the `anchorRect` prop so the bubble's bottom-right corner sits just above the anchor's top-right corner (opens upward).
- [ ] Clicking outside the bubble emits `close`; clicking inside does not.
- [ ] `npx nuxt typecheck` passes with no new errors.

**Verify:** `npx nuxt typecheck` → no errors in `app/components/cards/NotePopover.vue`. (Visual/interaction behavior verified manually in Task 4 — this codebase has no component-test setup.)

Full plan (exact code): `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-combo-card-note-loguse.md` (Task 3)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/components/cards/NotePopover.vue"], "verifyCommand": "npx nuxt typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders via Teleport to body", "displays note prop text in a rounded bubble", "positions via anchorRect opening upward", "outside click emits close, inside click does not"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire note indicator and log-use button into ComboCard.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Users can see a note indicator on cards with a note (tap to view via NotePopover), and log today's use with one tap, both without leaving the combo list.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/components/cards/ComboCard.vue:1-32` (script), `:46-60` (template, top-right pill + bottom-left badge area)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] A combo with a non-empty `note` shows a small circular icon button (`Icon name="note"`) in the bottom-right corner of the photo area; empty `note` hides it.
- [ ] Tapping the note button does not navigate to the combo editor.
- [ ] Tapping the note button opens `NotePopover` anchored to the button, showing `combo.note`; tapping outside closes it.
- [ ] The top-right glass pill contains both the heart button and a new log-use icon button (`Icon name="drop_log"`).
- [ ] Tapping the log-use button does not navigate to the combo editor.
- [ ] Tapping the log-use button calls `combosStore.logUse(combo.id)`.

**Verify:** `npx nuxt typecheck` passes, then manual dev-server check (6 checks listed in plan Step 5): note icon shows/hides correctly, popover shows text and doesn't navigate, popover closes on outside click, log-use button doesn't navigate and updates the "last used"/"×N last mo" badges, repeated same-day taps don't duplicate history entries (checked via editor's Usage History list).

Full plan (exact code + manual verification steps): `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-08-combo-card-note-loguse.md` (Task 4)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/components/cards/ComboCard.vue"], "verifyCommand": "npx nuxt typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["note icon shows only when combo.note is non-empty", "note button click.stop prevents card navigation", "note button opens NotePopover anchored correctly showing combo.note", "outside click closes popover", "log-use button added to top-right pill next to heart", "log-use button click.stop prevents navigation and calls combosStore.logUse"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
